name: Passover Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Passover vanilla sugar or 1 teaspoon vanilla
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar, white sugar, and Passover vanilla sugar (or vanilla) with the butter until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the salt, matzoh meal, cake meal, potato starch, and chocolate chips.
4. Chill the dough for at least an hour or overnight. The dough can be frozen for longer storage.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
7. Scoop tablespoons of dough onto the prepared sheets, leaving space between each cookie for spreading.
8. Bake for 12 minutes.
9. Allow cookies to cool on the parchment paper for 10-15 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to finish cooling.
